results.title: Will the RBA cut the cash rate at its August 2026 meeting?
results.resolution_criteria: This question resolves YES if the Reserve Bank of Australia announces a reduction in the cash rate target at its August 2026 monetary policy meeting.

results.title: Will global CO2 emissions decline in 2026?
results.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the Global Carbon Project reports a year-over-year decline.
